experiences.title: IT Development Intern
experiences.description:
• Developed a python program which was able to predict the cost of vehicle parts within the FEDEBOM Ford database with respect to various attributes within the database.
 • This involved the process of using Factor Analysis to convert categorical data into numerical data, allowing the use of Multiple Linear Regression to predict the cost of the vehicle parts. • This project was developed within an Agile team environment to facilitate collaboration between multiple department managers and team members.

experiences.title: IT Development Intern
experiences.description: • Developed a user-friendly and accessible way to view FEDEBOM data in the form of charts, graphs, and tables for an intuitive viewing experience to increase engineer productivity. • Worked with the library Limitless, which is similar to Bootstrap framework, to implement the web interface.

experiences.title: IT Development Intern
experiences.description: • Developed a software with python that scanned Ford Vehicle Requirement documents and output the list of requirements rules within the documents in a clear and convenient format for Ford engineers. • Applied various machine learning models such as SVM, Nearest Neighbor, etc., along with NTLK to parse the Ford Vehicle Requirement documents to extract the individual requirement rules.

experiences.title: Grocery Stocker
experiences.description: • Worked individually and in a team to ensure the store operated smoothly by assisting in the receiving, storing, and stocking of products in its designated position
